mapper.select: SELECT member_no AS member_account, member_password, member_name, gender AS member_gender, age AS member_age, NULL AS member_height, NULL AS member_weight, phone AS member_phone, register_date AS card_time, total_class_count AS card_class, remain_class_count AS card_next_class FROM member
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (member_no, member_password, member_name, gender, age, phone, register_date, total_class_count, remain_class_count) VALUES (#{memberAccount}, #{memberPassword}, #{memberName}, #{memberGender}, #{memberAge}, #{memberPhone}, #{cardTime}, #{cardClass}, #{cardNextClass})
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET member_password = #{memberPassword}, member_name = #{memberName}, gender = #{memberGender}, age = #{memberAge}, phone = #{memberPhone}, total_class_count = #{cardClass}, remain_class_count = #{cardNextClass} WHERE member_no = #{memberAccount}
mapper.select: SELECT member_no AS member_account, member_password, member_name, gender AS member_gender, age AS member_age, NULL AS member_height, NULL AS member_weight, phone AS member_phone, register_date AS card_time, total_class_count AS card_class, remain_class_count AS card_next_class FROM member WHERE member_no = #{memberAccount} AND member_password = #{memberPassword}

SELECT member_no AS member_account, member_password, member_name, gender AS member_gender, age AS member_age, NULL AS member_height, NULL AS member_weight, phone AS member_phone, register_date AS card_time, total_class_count AS card_class, remain_class_count AS card_next_class FROM member WHERE member_no = #{memberAccount}
SELECT MAX(member_no) FROM member WHERE member_no LIKE CONCAT(#{yearPrefix}, '%')
